title: hamming
summary: Generate a Hamming window as an N-by-1 real column vector.
description: `hamming(N)` returns an `N x 1` real column vector containing the symmetric Hamming window coefficients used in standard DSP and FFT preprocessing workflows.
behaviors: `hamming(N)` expects a nonnegative scalar integer length.
For `N > 1`, coefficients follow the symmetric Hamming formula `0.54 - 0.46*cos(2*pi*n/(N-1))`.
This currently documents the common one-argument symmetric form.
